meaning: vt.插入中间,插于中间装饰
examples: Conclusion: The interlay method of myringoplasty is an ideal method for healing perforation of tympani.
English middle construction, which involves a complex interlay between syntax and semantics, is one of the most heatedly discussed topics in the linguistics.
The hearing recovery of interlay method group was better than underlay method group. Function of Eustachian tube kept good condition in interlay method group.
